title: Selling Digital Products Without PayPal: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a Nigerian digital creator with a bestselling ebook, but PayPal freezes your account due to 'fraudulent activity' without explaining the reason. You're stuck, unable to sell your digital product through the platform you've relied on. You're not alone. Thousands of creators worldwide face similar restrictions on PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip due to geographic, banking, or KYC limitations. This guide is for those creators, offering a clear alternative to sell digital products without relying on those platforms.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip may have their limitations, but they also offer robust features for creators. PayPal, for instance, provides a user-friendly interface for buyers, while Stripe offers advanced payment processing capabilities. Gumroad focuses on digital product delivery and sales analytics. However, these platforms' restrictive policies often outweigh their benefits, especially for creators in restricted countries. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine provides a backend infrastructure for automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts without requiring a payment processor account. This offers a more reliable and flexible solution for digital creators.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip have varying policies regarding restricted countries. PayPal, for example, blocks accounts from several countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe's restrictions are also geographically based, while Gumroad's policy focuses on banking and KYC requirements. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's NOWPayments payment processor supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, eliminating the need for buyer accounts or KYC verification. This makes it an ideal solution for creators in restricted countries, who can now sell digital products without the hassle of payment processor restrictions.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment processing speed and fees are crucial considerations for digital creators. PayPal's fees range from 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction to 4.4% + $0.30 for cross-border transactions. Stripe's fees are also competitive, but they may vary depending on the plan and location. Gumroad's fees are generally lower, but its payment processing capabilities are limited. Unchained Commerce's NOWPayments, on the other hand, offers fast payment processing and competitive fees, with no hidden charges or surprise fees. This makes it an attractive option for creators looking for a reliable and cost-effective payment solution.
PayPal's restrictions on restricted countries are more than just a minor inconvenience – they can be a career-killer for digital creators.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are essential for efficient digital product sales. PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad offer some level of automation, but their capabilities are limited compared to Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine. This engine provides instant automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, ensuring a seamless experience for buyers and creators alike. With Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), creators can integrate their frontend wallet, enabling buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, and access live price feeds for real-time market data. This level of automation and delivery capabilities sets Unchained Commerce apart from its competitors.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Unchained Commerce depends on your specific situation. If you're a creator in a restricted country, Unchained Commerce's NOWPayments payment processor and Core Shop Engine offer a reliable and flexible solution. If you value automation and delivery capabilities, Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) provide a seamless experience for buyers and creators. Consider your options carefully and choose the one that best suits your needs.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Unchained Commerce's NOWPayments payment processor supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, making it the most versatile payment solution for digital creators.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

For those looking for more information on selling digital products without PayPal, check out our GitHub repository at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. Our Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) product also offers frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds, making it easy for buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling digital products without PayPal, follow these steps: Set up your Unchained Commerce account and install the Core Shop Engine. Configure your NOWPayments payment processor to support your preferred cryptocurrencies. Integrate your frontend wallet using Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99). Create your digital product and set a price. Publish your product and start selling. Monitor your sales and analytics to adjust your strategy as needed.
Digital creators in restricted countries have been waiting for a reliable and flexible solution to sell their products – and Unchained Commerce delivers.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
